title: rhodiola rosea var. integrifolia
intro: Rhodiola rosea var. integrifolia, also known as the 'green-leafed rose root', is a perennial plant in the family Crassulaceae, native to the Tibetan Plateau. Rhodiola rosea var. integrifolia is known for its medicinal properties, including adaptogenic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to enhance mental and physical performance, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rhodiola rosea var. integrifolia include capsules, tablets, and tinctures, as well as teas and infusions, which can be used to support the body's natural response to stress and promote a healthy balance of hormones.
